prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Honda F20C (S2000 AP1)** with a **Toda Racing 2.2L stroker kit** (87mm crank, 94mm pistons, forged rods) and **Toda A3 camshafts** (284° duration, 11.5mm lift) paired with a **Hondata KPro V4 ECU** for individual cylinder tuning and launch control. Retain the stock F20C transmission but upgrade to a **PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset** with a **Quaife ATB differential** for improved power handling.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 56mm compressor) on a **Full-Race Motorsports F20C turbo manifold** with **Tial MV-R 38mm wastegate** and **Tial Q 50mm blow-off valve**. Intercooled with a **GReddy Type-RS front-mount intercooler** (600hp capacity) and **Hose Techniques silicone couplers** with **TurboSmart V-Band clamps**. Fuel system upgraded with **ID1000x injectors**, **Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump**, and a **Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator**.

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (adjustable damping, 24-way rebound, 16-way compression) paired with **Cusco front and rear sway bars** (22mm front, 18mm rear) and **SuperPro poly bushings** (front lower control arms, rear trailing arms). Braking system upgraded to **Endless CC-R6 rotors** (280mm front, 260mm rear) with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**. Wheels: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** (16x8 +35 front, 16x9 +38 rear) with **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R** (215/45/16 front, 235/45/16 rear).
estetica: Full **J's Racing Type-RR widebody conversion kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, rear diffuser) with **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented, 50% weight reduction). Rear wing: **Voltex Type-3** (1700mm width, 3D endplates) mounted on **J's Racing aluminum pedestals**. Front lip: **C-West JDM Mugen-style lip** with **custom LED fog light delete plates**.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a **Sparco Pro ADV racing seat** (FIA 8855-1999 certified) on **Bride Low Max II seat rails**, paired with a **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel** and **Takata Drift III 4-point harness**. Roll cage: **Custom 8-point chromoly cage** by **AutoPower Industries** (gusseted main hoop, door bars, harness bar). Shift knob: **Mugen MF-10 (F20C-specific)** with **BeatRush short shifter** (30% reduction in throw).

Exterior lighting: **Morimoto XB LED headlights** (H11 projector retrofit) with **Depo Racing JDM-style clear corner lights**. Rear: **Valenti LED taillights** (smoked lenses, sequential turn signals). Paint: **House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the roof and pillars. Badging: **Mugen MF-10 front emblem** and **Toda Racing rear badge** (replacing Honda script).
